meaning: adj.规则的,稳定的,有固定规律的
examples: Turbulence is an extraordinarily complex three-dimensional flow which is unsteady, inerratic and composed of eddies.
The experimental results indicated that the frost layer grew very slowly with the effect of ultrasound, and the frost layer composed by "frost line" was more inerratic.
Liquid crystal is a kind of instar matter between completeness inerratic crystal and isotropic liquid. Its characters are between the solid crystal and the isotropic liquid.
